tuition_fee.note: Fees are approved by the Shikshan Shulkha Samiti (Fee Regulatory Authority) and remain fixed for the entire course duration.

hostel_fee.note: Hostel fee covers accommodation and three meals a day. Wi-Fi and laundry are included.

total_annual_cost.day_scholar: Approximately Rs. 1,30,000 to Rs. 1,35,000 per year (tuition + other fees)
total_annual_cost.hosteller: Approximately Rs. 1,90,000 to Rs. 2,00,000 per year (tuition + hostel + other fees)

installment_options.details: Fees can be paid in two installments per year — first installment at the time of admission, second installment by January.

refund_policy.before_cutoff: Full refund if withdrawal before the last CAP round cutoff date.
refund_policy.after_cutoff: Partial refund as per DTE Maharashtra norms. Processing fee of Rs. 1,000 is non-refundable.

scholarship_note: SC/ST/OBC/EBC students may be eligible for full or partial fee waiver via MahaDBT portal. Merit scholarship available for CGPA above 9.0.
hidden_charges: There are no hidden charges. All fees are transparently listed in the admission brochure.
fee_hike: Fee revision is subject to government approval and is typically minimal — around 5% every two years.
